page: Microsoft Azure NC72ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance belonging to the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server features an x86_64 architecture with 72 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. It is equipped with 264.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 3.67 GB of RAM per core.

The hardware configuration includes a single GPU to accelerate parallel computing workloads. For local data storage, the instance is bundled with 3960 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage, enabling high-throughput disk configurations. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile balances a high vCPU count with dedicated GPU acceleration and substantial local storage, making it a dense resource allocation for specialized workloads. This server is designed for workloads such as GPU-accelerated compute tasks, rendering, machine learning inference, and data-intensive processing that require local high-capacity storage.
description: Microsoft Azure NC72ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance within the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family, operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This server is built on the x86_64 architecture and features 72 dedicated Intel vCPUs alongside 264.0 GB of system memory, which provides approximately 3.67 GB of RAM per core. The hardware profile is equipped with a single GPU to accelerate parallel computing tasks, and it includes 3960 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance. Designed for high-density resource allocation, this server offers a qualitative balance of compute power, GPU acceleration, and local storage capacity. It is optimized for demanding workloads such as GPU-accelerated data processing, rendering, machine learning inference, and other data-intensive applications that require substantial local storage.
